title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_grep
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_grep' MCP tool.

root.description: Repo path, array of paths, or "*" for all MCP roots.

pattern.description: Search pattern (basic regex), always passed as `-e <pattern>`.

ref.description: Commit/branch/tag to search the tree at, instead of the working tree. Must be a safe ref token.

paths.description: Limit search to these paths (must resolve within the repo root).

filesOnly.description: List matching file paths only (`-l`), omitting line/text detail.

maxMatches.description: Max matches (or files, when `filesOnly`) per root (hard cap 1000, default 200).
